transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Do we have to bring our laptops to class tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. The instructor said we'll be working on the online project during class.

transcript.question_intro: Why should the students bring their laptops?

questions.prompt: Why should the students bring their laptops?

choices.text: They will take an online exam.
They will work on an online project.

questions.explanation: The instructor said the class will work on the online project.
questions.evidence: We'll be working on the online project during class.
